name: Tooltip
description: Renders tooltip at given element on mouse over or other event
searchText: tooltip renders tooltip at given element on mouse over or other event @mantine/core /core/tooltip arrowoffset arrowposition arrowradius arrowsize autocontrast children closedelay color defaultopened disabled events floatingstrategy inline keepmounted label middlewares multiline offset onpositionchange opendelay opened portalprops position radius refprop target transitionprops witharrow withinportal zindex

props.name: arrowOffset
props.description: Arrow offset in px

props.name: arrowPosition
props.description: Arrow position relative to the tooltip

props.name: arrowRadius
props.description: Arrow border-radius in px

props.name: arrowSize
props.description: Arrow size in px

props.name: autoContrast
props.description: If set, adjusts text color based on background color for filled variant

props.name: children
props.description: Target element, must support ref prop and ...others

props.name: closeDelay
props.description: Close delay in ms

props.name: color
props.description: Key of theme.colors or any valid CSS color, controls tooltip background, by default set based on current color scheme

props.name: defaultOpened
props.description: Uncontrolled tooltip initial opened state

props.name: disabled
props.description: If set, tooltip element will not be rendered

props.name: events
props.description: Determines which events will be used to show tooltip
props.defaultValue: { hover: true, focus: false, touch: false }

type.name: { hover: boolean; focus: boolean; touch: boolean; }

props.name: floatingStrategy
props.description: Changes floating ui [position strategy](https://floating-ui.com/docs/usefloating#strategy)

props.name: inline
props.description: Must be set if the tooltip target is an inline element

props.name: keepMounted
props.description: If set, the tooltip is not unmounted from the DOM when hidden, display: none styles are applied instead

props.name: label
props.description: Tooltip content

props.name: middlewares
props.description: Floating ui middlewares to configure position handling, { flip: true, shift: true, inline: false } by default

props.name: multiline
props.description: Determines whether content should be wrapped on to the next line, false by default

props.name: offset
props.description: Space between target element and tooltip in px

props.name: onPositionChange
props.description: Called when tooltip position changes

props.name: openDelay
props.description: Open delay in ms

props.name: opened
props.description: Controlled opened state

props.name: portalProps
props.description: Props to pass down to the portal when withinPortal is true

props.name: position
props.description: Tooltip position relative to target element (Tooltip component) or mouse (Tooltip.Floating component)

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius, numbers are converted to rem@default theme.defaultRadius

props.name: refProp
props.description: Key of the prop that can be used to access element ref, ref by default

props.name: target
props.description: Selector, ref of an element or element itself that should be used for positioning

props.name: transitionProps
props.description: Props passed down to the Transition component that used to animate tooltip presence, use to configure duration and animation type

props.name: withArrow
props.description: If set, the tooltip has an arrow

props.name: withinPortal
props.description: Determines whether tooltip should be rendered within Portal, true by default

props.name: zIndex
props.description: Tooltip z-index, 300 by default
